titleStmt.title: SII 39.239: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 239. (A.R. No. 239 of 1916.) SRIMUSHNAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. NITYĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL KULŌTTUṄGA CHŌḺADĒVA I-44TH YEAR (1114 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to a gift of 24 sheep to a person Marudūruḍaiyān for burning two lamps in the temple of Tirumuṭṭamuḍaiyār at Viḻandaiyūṟ-kūṟṟam, a sub-division of VaḍagaraiVirudarājabhayaṅkara vaḷanāḍu by Kāmadēvaṉ Poṉṉambalakkūttaṉ, a native of Vāgūr in Vāgūr nāḍu, a sub-division of Puraṅgara(m)bai nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kulottuṅkacoḻa tevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10 4 Āvatu vaṭakarai virutarājapayaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu viḷaintaiyūr kūṟṟattu Uṭaiyār tirumuṭ
ṭa muṭaiyārkkup puṟaṅkarampai nāṭṭu vākūr nāṭṭu vākūruṭaiyāṉ kāmatevaṉ poṉṉampalak kūttaṉ teṟṟam paṭṭāṉa kulottuṅka coḻanallūr
marutūruṭaiyāṉ tevanvaṟiyāṉ nalaṅkiḷi nāṭṭuveḷāṉ pakkal tirumuṭṭa muṭaiyārkku cantiviḷakku Iraṇṭiṟku viṭṭa cāvāmūvāpperāṭu Irupattunālum kaikko
ṇṭu cantirātittavar tāṉum taṉ varkattārum celutta celutta kaṭavatāka viṭṭeṉ vākūruṭaiyāṉ kāmatevaṉ poṉṉampalak kūttaṉeṉ Itu paṉmāyeśvara rakṣai
Immarutūruṭaiyāṉ Erittu varukiṟa cantiviḷakku Iraṇṭukkum Ivvāṭu Irupattu nāluṅ kaikkoṇṭu Ivviḷakku Iraṇṭum can
tirātittavar celuttak kaṭaveṉāka Eṉperile tiriviṭṭeṉ Ikkoyil civappirāmaṇaṉ kaucikar tiruveṇ
kāṭu kūttaṉeṉ
Digital edition of SII 39.239 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
